event: underwent DALK in the left eye with big bubble technique
whitish infiltrates along the graft-host junction almost 180°
corneal scrapings from recipient rim sent for microbiology
host DM was clear and intact
thin line of residual infiltrates in the host rim
preferred not to convert the procedure into PK
Gram-stain showed presence of Gram-negative Bacilli
infiltrates along the entire graft host junction
topical antibiotics were increased to half hourly
imipenem (5 mg/ml) drops was started hourly during day and two hourly at night
infiltration extended toward center of graft
therapeutic penetrating keratoplasty (TPK) was carried out
infiltrates were observed also in host DM
gatifloxacin drops was added every half hourly
prednisolone drops 1% 4 times a day was added
